subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Installs the project dependencies from the composer.lock file if present, or falls back on the composer.json.

options.name: --no-dev
options.description: Disables installation of require-dev packages.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Outputs the operations but will not execute anything (implicitly enables --verbose).

options.name: --no-autoloader
options.description: Skips autoloader generation.

options.name: --no-scripts
options.description: Skips the execution of all scripts defined in composer.json.

options.name: --no-progress
options.description: Removes the progress display that can mess with some terminals or scripts which don't handle backspace characters.

options.name: --optimize-autoloader
options.description: Optimize autoloader during autoloader dump.

options.name: --classmap-authoritative
options.description: Autoload classes from the classmap only. Implicitly enables `--optimize-autoloader`.

options.name: --apcu-autoloader
options.description: Use APCu to cache found/not-found classes.

options.name: --apcu-autoloader-prefix
options.description: Use a custom prefix for the APCu autoloader cache. Implicitly enables --apcu-autoloader

options.name: --ignore-platform-req
options.description: Ignore a specific platform requirement (php & ext- packages).

options.name: --ignore-platform-reqs
options.description: Ignore all platform requirements (php & ext- packages).

subcommands.name: require
subcommands.description: Adds required packages to your composer.json and installs them.

options.name: --dev
options.description: Add packages to require-dev.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Outputs the operations but will not execute anything (implicitly enables --verbose).

options.name: --no-progress
options.description: Removes the progress display that can mess with some terminals or scripts which don't handle backspace characters.

options.name: --optimize-autoloader
options.description: Optimize autoloader during autoloader dump.

options.name: --no-update
options.description: Disables the automatic update of the dependencies (implies --no-install).

options.name: --no-install
options.description: Skip the install step after updating the composer.json file.

options.name: --update-with-dependencies
options.description: Allows inherited dependencies to be updated, except those that are root requirements.

options.name: --update-with-all-dependencies
options.description: Allows all inherited dependencies to be updated, including those that are root requirements.

options.name: --with-all-dependencies
options.description: Alias for --update-with-all-dependencies

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Updates your dependencies to the latest version according to composer.json, and updates the composer.lock file.

options.name: --no-dev
options.description: Run the dependency update with the --no-dev option.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Outputs the operations but will not execute anything (implicitly enables --verbose).

options.name: --no-autoloader
options.description: Skips autoloader generation.

options.name: --no-scripts
options.description: Skips the execution of all scripts defined in composer.json.

options.name: --optimize-autoloader
options.description: Optimize autoloader during autoloader dump.

options.name: --info
options.description: Show information about packages.

options.name: --with-dependencies
options.description: Update also dependencies of packages in the command argument.

options.name: --with-all-dependencies
options.description: Update also dependencies of packages in the command argument, including those which are root requirements.

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Removes a package from the require or require-dev.

options.name: --dev
options.description: Remove packages from require-dev.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Outputs the operations but will not execute anything (implicitly enables --verbose).

options.name: --no-progress
options.description: Removes the progress display that can mess with some terminals or scripts which don't handle backspace characters.

options.name: --no-update
options.description: Disables the automatic update of the dependencies (implies --no-install).

options.name: --no-install
options.description: Skip the install step after updating the composer.json file.

options.name: --update-with-dependencies
options.description: Allows inherited dependencies to be updated with explicit dependencies.

options.name: --update-with-all-dependencies
options.description: Allows all inherited dependencies to be updated, including those that are root requirements.

options.name: --optimize
options.description: Optimize autoloader during autoloader dump.

options.name: --classmap-authoritative
options.description: Autoload classes from the classmap only. Implicitly enables `--optimize`.

options.name: --apcu
options.description: Use APCu to cache found/not-found classes.

options.name: --apcu-prefix
options.description: Use a custom prefix for the APCu autoloader cache. Implicitly enables --apcu

options.name: --no-dev
options.description: Disables autoload-dev rules.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Outputs the operations but will not execute anything.

options.name: --strict-psr
options.description: Return a failed status code if a PSR-4 or PSR-0 mapping error is found.

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Creates a basic composer.json file in current directory.

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the package

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of package

options.name: --author
options.description: Author name of package

options.name: --type
options.description: Type of package (e.g. library, project, metapackage, composer-plugin)

options.name: --homepage
options.description: Homepage of package

options.name: --require
options.description: Package to require with a version constraint, e.g. foo/bar:1.0.0 or foo/bar=1.0.0 or "foo/bar 1.0.0"

options.name: --require-dev
options.description: Package to require for development with a version constraint, e.g. foo/bar:1.0.0 or foo/bar=1.0.0 or "foo/bar 1.0.0"

options.name: --stability
options.description: Minimum stability (empty or one of: stable, RC, beta, alpha, dev)

options.name: --license
options.description: License of package

options.name: --repository
options.description: Add custom repositories, either by URL or using JSON arrays

options.name: --all
options.description: List all packages

options.name: --installed
options.description: List installed packages only (default)

options.name: --platform
options.description: List platform packages only

options.name: --available
options.description: List available packages only

options.name: --self
options.description: Show the root package information

options.name: --name-only
options.description: List package names only

options.name: --path
options.description: Show package paths

options.name: --tree
options.description: Show the dependencies as a tree

subcommands.name: outdated
subcommands.description: Shows a list of installed packages that have updates available, including their current and latest versions.

options.name: --all
options.description: Show all installed packages with their latest versions

options.name: --direct
options.description: Restricts the list of packages to your direct dependencies.

options.name: --strict
options.description: Return a non-zero exit code when there are outdated packages.

options.name: --minor-only
options.description: Show only packages that have minor SemVer-compatible updates.

options.name: --format
options.description: Format of the output: text or json

globalOptions.name: --no-interaction
globalOptions.description: Do not ask any interactive question

globalOptions.name: --working-dir
globalOptions.description: If specified, use the given directory as working directory.

globalOptions.name: --profile
globalOptions.description: Display timing and memory usage information

detectors.name: composer_json
detectors.command: cat composer.json 2>/dev/null | jq '.require' 2>/dev/null || cat composer.json 2>/dev/null | grep 'require' -A 10 | head -15
